compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue triangle labeled 'ADF' inside the NEURONS oval; contains tph-1.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle labeled 'AWB' inside the NEURONS oval; contains ser-6.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' inside the NEURONS oval; contains mod-1; small black dot clusters drawn at its corners represent secreted molecules.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red pentagon labeled 'RIC' inside the NEURONS oval; contains tbh-1.

compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray shaded oval labeled 'NEURONS' containing ADF, AWB, URX, and RIC cell-type nodes.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded box labeled 'INTESTINE' in Panel E; contains nhr-76 -> ATGL -> beta-oxidation / Fat loss pathway.

genes.snippet: Blue triangle node labeled 'ADF' in the NEURONS oval; also appears in Panel A/B as reporter-line genotype and quantified bar.
Green triangle node labeled 'AWB' inside the NEURONS oval in Panel E.
Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' in the NEURONS oval; also referenced in Panel C/D as Pflp-8::mod-1SAS transgene.
Red pentagon node labeled 'RIC' inside the NEURONS oval in Panel E.
First node in the intestinal sub-pathway; nhr-76 -> ATGL -> beta-oxidation / Fat loss.
Second node in the intestinal sub-pathway; receives activation from nhr-76 and drives beta-oxidation / Fat loss.

tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ADF (tph-1) to URX (mod-1) labeled '5-HT' in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow from AWB (ser-6) to ADF (tph-1) on the left side of the NEURONS oval in Panel E. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid pointed arrow from RIC (tbh-1) upward to AWB (ser-6) labeled 'Oct' (octopamine) in Panel E.
Dashed arrow from URX (mod-1) pointing down/left toward RIC (tbh-1) in Panel E; dashed line suggests indirect or modulatory regulation.
Dashed arrow from URX (mod-1) crossing to the INTESTINE box, labeled 'endocrine signal' in Panel E; secreted molecules depicted as black dot clusters near URX.
Solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL within the INTESTINE box in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow from ATGL to 'beta-oxidation / Fat loss' outcome within the INTESTINE box in Panel E. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
